title: rubus harpago
intro: Rubus harpago, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a type of bramble native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its therapeutic value. The health benefits of Rubus harpago include its potential to help manage diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Rubus harpago can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
